---
title: "Connor Wolosewicz"
image: pfp3.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/connor-wolosewicz
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/connor.wolo?igsh=MWlmZ3ZxZHpyMXRjYQ%3D%3D&utm_source=qr
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com
---
About Me
---

My name is Connor, and I am a senior majoring in Environmental Science and Public Policy. I have already learned R in another class and I am excited to explore it further. In my free time, I like to read, watch TV, go to the gym, bake, and of course, travel!
